label: Immunizable comp
description: Makes this hediff interact with the pawn's immunity system.

Class.label: Properties class
Class.description: C# HediffCompProperties type for this list item.

severityPerDayImmune.label: Severity per day (immune)
severityPerDayImmune.description: Severity change per day when fully immune.

immunityPerDayPassion.label: Immunity per day (passion)
immunityPerDayPassion.description: Immunity gain per day from passion.

immuneAgeThreshold.label: Immune age threshold
immuneAgeThreshold.description: Age below which the pawn is naturally immune. -1 to disable.

severityPerDayNotImmune.label: Severity per day (not immune)
severityPerDayNotImmune.description: Severity change per day when not immune.

makeSickThought.label: Make sick thought
makeSickThought.description: If true, gain a sick thought when this becomes life-threatening.
